data.content:
buyers,relationship	Carlos Hernandez
Maria Hernandez
Carlos Hernandez and Maria Hernandez are co-buyers of the property in the real estate transaction.

financing,transaction coordination	First National Bank of Louisville
ZHomes TC Platform
ZHomes TC Platform coordinates the transaction which includes financing from First National Bank of Louisville.

closing,legal services	April 30, 2026
Bluegrass Title & Escrow
Bluegrass Title & Escrow is responsible for closing the transaction on April 30, 2026.

relationship,sellers	Linda Patterson
Robert Patterson
Robert Patterson and Linda Patterson are co-sellers of the property in the real estate transaction.

buyer agent,representation	Maria Hernandez
Sarah Mitchell
Sarah Mitchell represents Maria Hernandez in the residential real estate transaction.

representation,seller agent	James Okafor
Robert Patterson
James Okafor represents Robert Patterson in the residential real estate transaction.

closing attorney,legal representation	Bluegrass Title & Escrow
David Nguyen
David Nguyen serves as the closing attorney for Bluegrass Title & Escrow in this transaction.

buyer agent,representation	Carlos Hernandez
Sarah Mitchell
Sarah Mitchell represents Carlos Hernandez in the residential real estate transaction.

buyer rights,due diligence	Inspection Contingencies
Maria Hernandez
Maria Hernandez has the right to conduct inspections and will operate under the outlined inspection contingencies in the agreement.

financial agreement,seller obligation	Repair Allowance
Robert Patterson
Robert Patterson agrees to credit the buyer up to $5,000 at closing for repairs identified in the home inspection.

environmental issue,property condition	Basement
Water Intrusion
The basement's condition is related to the water intrusion issue that occurred during the flood event.

buyer representation,real estate transaction	Maria Hernandez
ZHomes TC Platform
Maria Hernandez interacted with ZHomes TC Platform during the real estate closing as a buyer.

buyer rights,due diligence	Carlos Hernandez
Inspection Contingencies
Carlos Hernandez has the right to conduct inspections and will operate under the outlined inspection contingencies in the agreement.

flood risk,property classification	FEMA Flood Zone X
Water Intrusion
The classification of FEMA Flood Zone X confirms the minimal flood risk impacting the water intrusion incident.

financial agreement,seller obligation	Linda Patterson
Repair Allowance
Linda Patterson agrees to credit the buyer up to $5,000 at closing for repairs identified in the home inspection.

real estate transaction,seller representation	Robert Patterson
ZHomes TC Platform
Robert Patterson coordinated with ZHomes TC Platform as the seller in the real estate transaction.

jurisdiction,legal framework	Commonwealth of Kentucky
Critical Deadlines Checklist
The Commonwealth of Kentucky provides the legal framework governing the terms outlined in the Critical Deadlines Checklist.

commission structure,financial implications	Estimated Closing Costs (Seller)
Total Commission
The total commission amount directly affects the estimated closing costs for the seller, influencing final proceeds.

representation,seller agent	James Okafor
Linda Patterson
James Okafor represents Linda Patterson in the residential real estate transaction.

buyer representation,real estate transaction	Carlos Hernandez
ZHomes TC Platform
Carlos Hernandez engaged with ZHomes TC Platform as the coordinating entity during the purchase process.

buyer right,contingency terms	Appraisal Contingency
Critical Deadlines Checklist
The appraisal contingency is included in the Critical Deadlines Checklist, providing the buyer the right to renegotiate or cancel.

commission structure,financial breakdown	Buyer's Agent Commission
Total Commission
The buyer's agent commission is a component of the total commission for the transaction.

seller expenses,transaction fee	Estimated Closing Costs (Seller)
TC Fee
The TC fee is included as part of the estimated closing costs incurred by the seller during the transaction.

closing requirements,seller obligations	Critical Deadlines Checklist
Utilities
The requirement for utilities maintenance is part of the obligations listed in the Critical Deadlines Checklist.

real estate transaction,seller representation	Linda Patterson
ZHomes TC Platform
Linda Patterson engaged with ZHomes TC Platform during the closing process as the seller.

commission structure,financial breakdown	Seller's Agent Commission
Total Commission
The seller's agent commission is another component of the total commission in the real estate transaction.

financial impact,transaction fees	Estimated Closing Costs (Buyer)
Total Commission
Estimated closing costs for the buyer are affected by the total commission paid in the transaction.

buyer obligations,contingency terms	Estimated Closing Costs (Buyer)
Home Sale Contingency
The absence of a home sale contingency impacts the estimated closing costs for the buyer, allowing for smoother transactions.
